codeReview.summary: Fix review passes. The implementation resolves all four prior blocking findings: path traversal containment in Codegen.Writer, :pi execution mode wired through Task.Agent codegen in Act3.Executor, route-param atom safety in Project handlers via bounded allowlist + String.to_existing_atom, and frontend API error-body propagation via ApiError on non-2xx responses.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture knowledge is stale about web UI coverage.
